subject: Add OOF user to OOM AAI config
commit_message:
Add OOF user to OOM AAI config

Issue-ID: AAI-1134
Change-Id: Ic40628175e58ce82fada21dd35e7435c869a88cb
Signed-off-by: Jimmy Forsyth <jf2512@att.com>

entries.message:
